title: Animated 'Shayla' header with water-fill effect and 60-second audio cue

requirements.text: Replace the current header logo/text in Header.tsx with an animated 'Shayla' text element that has a floating, wooden/ivory-white carved (engraved) visual style. The text should appear as if it is etched into a warm ivory/cream wooden surface, with appropriate text-shadow and texture effects using CSS.

quotes: هدر برنامه را یک shayla حک شود اما بصورت شناور وودنیونی سفید

acceptanceCriteria: The header displays the word 'Shayla' in a carved/engraved style
The text has an ivory/cream warm-white tone resembling wood or bone material
The text has a subtle floating/levitation animation (gentle vertical bob using CSS keyframes)
The engraved effect is visible through layered text-shadow or SVG filter

requirements.text: Add a water-fill animation around the 'Shayla' header text. Every second, the water level visibly rises around the text, completing a full fill cycle over 60 seconds. Implement this using an SVG clip-path or a Canvas element overlaid on the text, animating a water wave that fills from bottom to top over 60 ticks (one tick per second). After 60 seconds, the fill resets to empty and restarts.

quotes: هر ثانیه درحال پر شدن اطراف آن با آب را ببینیم

acceptanceCriteria: A water-fill visual effect surrounds or overlays the 'Shayla' text
The water level rises incrementally once per second (60 steps over 60 seconds)
The water has a wave-like undulating top edge to look realistic
After 60 seconds the water drains/resets and begins filling again
The fill animation is smooth and visually distinct each second

requirements.text: Play an audio sound effect in the browser exactly once every 60 seconds, timed to coincide with the water completing a full fill cycle around the 'Shayla' header text. The sound should evoke the passage of time (e.g., a water drop, chime, or soft bell). Use the Web Audio API to generate a procedural tone (soft bell/chime) so no external audio file is required. The 60-second timer resets after each play.

quotes: در انتها یک افکت صوتی از گذر زمان پخش شود که یعنی یک دقیقه مساوی با ۶۰ ثانیه گذشته است از آخرین صوت و پرشدن آب در اطراف کلمه

acceptanceCriteria: A soft chime/bell audio effect plays when the 60-second water fill cycle completes
The audio is generated via Web Audio API (no external file dependency)
The sound plays only once per 60-second cycle
The timer is measured from the last time the sound was played
The sound and water reset are synchronized — both happen at the same moment

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths)
Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui/
Audio must be generated via Web Audio API — no external audio file dependencies
The animation must not degrade performance; use requestAnimationFrame or CSS keyframes
nonGoals: Changing any backend logic or data models
Adding user controls to start/stop the animation or audio
Changing the navigation or routing behavior of the header
Loading external fonts, textures, or audio files from a CDN
